formulas.name: Complex Number
formulas.variables: a and b are real numbers, i is the imaginary unit (i² = -1)

formulas.name: Conjugate of a Complex Number
formulas.notes: used to rationalize denominators and simplify expressions
formulas.variables: a and b are real numbers

formulas.name: Modulus of a Complex Number
formulas.notes: used to find the distance of a complex number from the origin
formulas.variables: a and b are real numbers

formulas.name: Argument of a Complex Number
formulas.notes: used to find the angle of a complex number with the positive x-axis
formulas.variables: a and b are real numbers, a ≠ 0

formulas.name: Product of Complex Numbers
formulas.variables: a, b, c, and d are real numbers

formulas.name: Quadratic Equation
formulas.notes: general form of a quadratic equation
formulas.variables: a, b, and c are real numbers, a ≠ 0

formulas.name: Solution of a Quadratic Equation (Quadratic Formula)
formulas.notes: used to find the roots of a quadratic equation
formulas.variables: a, b, and c are real numbers, a ≠ 0

formulas.name: Nature of Roots of a Quadratic Equation
formulas.notes: used to determine the nature of the roots of a quadratic equation (real and distinct, real and equal, or imaginary)
formulas.variables: a, b, and c are real numbers

formulas.name: Condition for Real and Distinct Roots
formulas.notes: used to check if the roots of a quadratic equation are real and distinct
formulas.variables: a, b, and c are real numbers

formulas.name: Condition for Real and Equal Roots
formulas.notes: used to check if the roots of a quadratic equation are real and equal
formulas.variables: a, b, and c are real numbers

formulas.name: Condition for Imaginary Roots
formulas.notes: used to check if the roots of a quadratic equation are imaginary
formulas.variables: a, b, and c are real numbers

formulas.name: Relationship between Coefficients and Roots
formulas.notes: used to find the sum and product of the roots of a quadratic equation
formulas.variables: α and β are the roots of the quadratic equation, a, b, and c are real numbers
